title: 48 Teams Confirmed: Full Group Draw for World Cup 2026
excerpt: All 48 teams have been confirmed for the historic 2026 FIFA World Cup. Here is the complete group draw breakdown with match venues across USA, Mexico, and Canada.
content:
## The Expanded Tournament

The 2026 FIFA World Cup marks a historic first: 48 teams competing across 16 stadiums in three host nations. The expanded format means 12 groups of 4 teams, with the top 2 from each group plus the 8 best third-placed teams advancing to a Round of 32.

## Complete Group Draw

### Group A 🇲🇽
- Mexico, Czech Republic, South Africa, South Korea
- Venues: Estadio Azteca, Estadio BBVA, Estadio Akron

### Group B 🇨🇦
- Canada, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Qatar, Switzerland
- Venues: BC Place, BMO Field, Lumen Field

### Group C 🇺🇸
- Brazil, Haiti, Morocco, Scotland
- Venues: SoFi Stadium, Levi's Stadium, NRG Stadium

### Group D 🇺🇸
- United States, Australia, Paraguay, Turkey
- Venues: AT&T Stadium, NRG Stadium, Arrowhead Stadium

### Group E
- Germany, Curaçao, Ecuador, Ivory Coast
- Venues: Lincoln Financial Field, Gillette Stadium, Mercedes-Benz Stadium

### Group F
- Netherlands, Japan, Sweden, Tunisia
- Venues: Hard Rock Stadium, Mercedes-Benz Stadium, NRG Stadium

### Group G
- Belgium, Egypt, Iran, New Zealand
- Venues: Lumen Field, Levi's Stadium, SoFi Stadium

### Group H
- Spain, Cape Verde, Saudi Arabia, Uruguay
- Venues: BC Place, BMO Field, Lumen Field

### Group I
- France, Iraq, Norway, Senegal
- Venues: AT&T Stadium, Arrowhead Stadium, NRG Stadium

### Group J
- Argentina, Algeria, Austria, Jordan
- Venues: MetLife Stadium, Lincoln Financial Field, Gillette Stadium

### Group K
- Portugal, Colombia, DR Congo, Uzbekistan
- Venues: Hard Rock Stadium, Mercedes-Benz Stadium, Estadio BBVA

### Group L
- England, Croatia, Ghana, Panama
- Venues: SoFi Stadium, Levi's Stadium, Estadio Akron

## Key Match Dates

| Round | Dates |
|-------|-------|
| Opening Match | June 11 — Mexico vs South Africa (Estadio Azteca) |
| Group Stage | June 11–27 |
| Round of 32 | June 28–30 |
| Round of 16 | July 2–5 |
| Quarter-Finals | July 9–10 |
| Semi-Finals | July 14–15 |
| Third Place | July 18 — Hard Rock Stadium |
| **Final** | **July 19 — MetLife Stadium** |

## VIP Access

For the ultimate World Cup experience, Vantage 26 offers exclusive VIP packages across all key matches. Whether you want the Presidential Suite for the Final, a Skybox for the Semi-Finals, or Rolls Royce service for the Opening Match, our concierge team delivers unmatched luxury.

Contact us to secure your place in history.
